name: OSHA Compliance MCP
description:
Query OSHA safety standards (29 CFR 1910 & 1926) with plain-English summaries. Built for AI agents and compliance software developers.

Tools:
- lookup_osha_standard: Search OSHA standards by topic, keyword, or section number
- get_osha_requirements: Key requirements for a specific standard
- get_penalty_info: OSHA penalty amounts by violation type
- get_ppe_requirements: PPE requirements by task/hazard
- check_applicability: Which standards apply to an industry or task
- get_osha_citations: Full regulatory text and official citations

Data: 479 OSHA standards across 29 CFR 1910 (General Industry) and 1926 (Construction), with plain-English summaries, key requirements, and violation codes.

Use cases: Safety apps, EHS software, compliance chatbots, workplace training tools.
